name: Steadfast Group Limited
analysis: SDF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.0800, stop A$4.9005, target A$5.6185 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
